## Type

<!-- Add the matching label to this PR so Release Drafter categorises it correctly. -->

- [ ] `feature` / `enhancement` — new functionality
- [ ] `bug` / `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `chore` / `refactor` — maintenance, no behaviour change
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `dependencies` — dependency updates
- [ ] `breaking-change` — breaks existing behaviour (bumps major version)
